title: MATANA - 10 Empty Reed Diffuser Glass Clear Bottles with 40 Reed Diffuser Sticks, 50ml - Glass Diffuser Bottle Essential Fragrance Oil Diffusers for Home Bathroom Decorative, Glass Reed Diffuser
features: SWEET SMELLING AROMA - Our diffusers create unique aromas & scents, using your own personal chosen essential oils. Simply place anywhere around the house for your friends, family & guests to enjoy, ensuring a cosy, fresh atmosphere throughout your home.

GREAT FOR GIFTING - Buy our reed diffuser empty bottles to treat a loved one on their birthday, anniversary & housewarming gift - or pamper yourself after a long hard day. The perfect destresser, they’re ideal for the bedroom, bathroom, dining room or living space, whilst working well in the office too, adding a heavenly warm scent wherever they’re placed.

GREAT VALUE PACK - Our classic square design diffuser bottle fits into any decor, while the solid heavy bottom provides a stable base for your reeds. These diffuser bottles hold up to 50ml of your chosen oils, are attractive looking, and their fragrances are long lasting & effective upon entering any room.

TOTAL RELAXATION - We know smell is linked to the mind and body, so relax your mind & unwind in the evenings, whilst enjoying the heavenly scents and pleasurable fragrance of your mixed & matched reeds & oils.
VERSATILE - The glass diffuser bottles are ideal for the bedroom, bathroom, dining room or living space, whilst working well in the office too, adding a heavenly warm scent wherever they’re placed.
description: Product Description The Secret to a Cosy Home. Make your house a home with uplifting and relaxing scents. Glass diffuser bottles are recyclable and multipurpose as well as reusable. Once your scent has finished, you can pop your bottle in the recycling, repurpose it by putting flowers in it, or purchase a refill to begin the experience again. They make a great eco alternative to air freshener bottles or aerosol cans and help to create a calm and cosy atmosphere.
